directly_useful_skills.fermat_use: URL Truth, sitemap/llms, canonical, hreflang, indexability, and technical SEO review prompts
GEO, llms surfaces, Research Hub extractability, and citation-oriented evidence containers
internal link graph, topic hub, research hub, and page type portfolio planning
CTA attribution, funnel event taxonomy, Search Intelligence, and privacy-safe measurement
result page, paid report preview, unlock CTA, and My Results conversion review
free result to paid report boundaries and upgrade screen review
result/report recovery and lifecycle email planning

useful_after_adaptation_skills.reason: Useful as the base for Fermat-specific product context, but upstream path and generic SaaS framing must be adapted.
Useful for content batches and Research Hub planning after CMS authority and claim gates.
Useful for Digital PR planning only with human-only outreach and tracking.
Useful for comparison strategy and competitor-informed gaps, not auto-generated comparison pages.
Useful for structured competitor dossiers against 123test, Truity, 16Personalities, CareerExplorer, and Chinese competitors.
Useful for claim-safe draft review prompts, not direct publishable copy generation.
Useful for VOC and search-intent research, but personas require real source evidence.
Useful for product-led SEO and linkable tool thinking; Fermat tests already fit this model.

risky_skills.risk: Can encourage scaled page creation before P0 discoverability cleanup, URL Truth, internal link, and claim gates are clean.
Can encourage broad submission before destination pages, tracking, claim review, and human approval are ready.
Can generate unsupported clinical, career, hiring, salary, treatment, or diagnostic claims if used directly.
Can lead to thin or aggressive competitor pages without verified data and claim review.
Can over-prioritize AI files or AI citation tactics over visible helpful content and current P0 cleanup.
Can over-markup invisible or non-authoritative content if not constrained by Fermat JSON-LD grounding gates.

fermat_internal_skill_recommendations.purpose: Centralize Fermat positioning, audiences, product loops, claim boundaries, and no-go rules.
Wrap SEO audit workflows around URL Truth, Search Channel Queue, CMS authority, and P0 cleanup.
Guide llms/GEO/Research Hub work while forbidding AI-bait and schema stuffing.
Ground JSON-LD and FAQ in visible backend/CMS content.
Control article, content page, career guide, and result/report content batches through import packages.
Prevent pSEO until URL Truth, discoverability, content quality, and claim gates pass.
Improve result/report conversion without frontend interpretation authority.
Run human-only Digital PR with tracking, claim review, and no bulk outreach.
Keep funnel attribution privacy-safe and backend revenue authoritative.
Enforce career, clinical, IQ, RIASEC, Big Five, MBTI, and Research claim boundaries.

pseo_guardrail_recommendations: Do not adopt programmatic-seo directly now.
Block pSEO until sitemap/llms hard-404 exposure and career job discoverability leakage are fixed.
Require backend entity data, stable entity keys, visible content, FAQ grounding, JSON-LD grounding, and internal links.
Require claim lint for every generated page class.
Keep Search Channel Queue human-approved and dry-run-first.
seo_ops_recommendations: Adapt seo-audit into fermat-seo-ops with URL Truth as authority.
Use ai-seo only after P0 discoverability cleanup and Research authority grounding.
Use schema skill principles only through Fermat JSON-LD/FAQ grounding gates.
Use site-architecture for internal link planning, not automatic CMS link writes.
cro_result_report_recommendations: Adapt cro and paywalls for result page clarity, paid report preview, unlock CTA, My Results card, and report recovery.
Keep backend result/report asset catalogs authoritative.
Fail closed when English interpretation assets are missing.
Do not use frontend fallback interpretation copy as authority.
digital_pr_recommendations: Use directory-submissions as a planning reference only.
Require destination page readiness, claim review, UTM/referral tracking, and manual sender approval.
No paid backlinks, no bulk outreach, no private email scraping, no transactional backlink asks.
Treat backlinks and referrals as observation signals, not URL Truth.
content_batch_recommendations: Use content-strategy for batch planning only after CMS authority is established.
Use copywriting for review prompts and variants, not direct publishable content.
Use customer-research only with source-backed evidence and confidence levels.
Prefer import packages and human review over direct CMS mutation.

risk_findings.finding: Upstream programmatic-seo can encourage scaled pages before Fermat's P0 discoverability cleanup is complete.
Generic copywriting workflows can produce unsupported clinical, career, hiring, salary, treatment, or diagnostic claims.
Schema guidance must be constrained so JSON-LD never marks up invisible or non-authoritative content.
Upstream skills do not account for Fermat's rule that fap-web fallback is not authority.
Directory, SEO, and GEO workflows must not enqueue or submit URLs outside Search Channel Queue approval.
Directory submissions without destination readiness and tracking would create vanity backlinks rather than measurable authority.

adoption_phases.name: read_only_reference_only
adoption_phases.action: Keep external repo in /private/tmp or as reference documentation only.

adoption_phases.name: product_marketing_context_draft
adoption_phases.action: Create Fermat-specific product marketing context from existing Fermat docs and claim boundaries.

adoption_phases.name: fork_adapt_selected_skills
adoption_phases.action: Adapt selected upstream patterns into Fermat-specific internal skills with authority and no-go rules.

adoption_phases.name: prompt_template_library
adoption_phases.action: Add Codex prompt templates for SEO Ops, CRO, content batches, and Digital PR review.

adoption_phases.name: pr_train_integration
adoption_phases.action: Use internal skills only through PR train entries, focused tests, and human approval gates.

do_not_adopt_now: npx skills install in Fermat repositories
unreviewed copywriting for clinical or career pages
schema changes without visible content grounding
Search Channel submission or queueing from marketing skills
